headline: Jim Cramer Recommends a Caller to Sell Half of Their Coterra Energy Position and “Let the Rest Run”
summary: Coterra Energy Inc. (NYSE:CTRA) is one of the stocks highlighted in Jim Cramer’s latest Mad Money recap as he provided top stock insights. A caller asked if they should ring the register now or wait for the company’s merger with Devon Energy. Cramer replied: I would sell half, because you’ve had just a monster move, […]
